title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIT Trichy

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIT Trichy
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Trichy. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About NIT Trichy:
NIT Trichy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy!
